message:
test(heredoc): add Codex heredoc integration tests (ovw4.3.8)

8 new integration tests proving dcg's Tier 3 heredoc/inline-script
analysis produces identical block decisions under Codex (exit 2 +
stderr) and Claude (exit 0 + JSON) protocols. Covers python
shutil.rmtree, node fs.rmSync heredoc, node -e child_process.execSync,
cross-protocol parity assertions, and a safe-command negative test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
